seoTitle: Pimlico vs Pimlico Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pimlico and Pimlico Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pimlico vs Pimlico Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pimlico and Pimlico Island.
heading: Pimlico vs Pimlico Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pimlico, New South Wales and Pimlico Island, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pimlico has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pimlico Island (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pimlico or Pimlico Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pimlico has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Pimlico Island scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pimlico scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Pimlico Island scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pimlico or Pimlico Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pimlico has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
